_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing data classification frameworks and implementing classification controls that enforce handling, access, and retention requirements based on data sensitivity and regulatory classification.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Skill SP-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-004 (DQ, cosine: 0.504), AI-A-001 (AI, cosine: 0.491).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.646). Shared vocabulary: [data, skill]. NICE-only terms [validating] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, based, classification, controls, designing, enforce] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.916, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.061 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:65.4%, C:34.5%). No dominant classification for "Skill in validating data" vs "Skill in designing data classification frameworks and implementing classificatio" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.506 < STS 0.646 (gap -0.140). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [validating] and [access, based, classification] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.0%. Shared tokens: [data, skill]. NICE-only: [validating]. WIDAI-only: [access, based, classification, controls, designing, enforce].
